## AbstractQuery.populate() method

Specifies fields to populate in the result documents

**Signature:**

```typescript
populate(path: string | PopulateField): this;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>

path

</td><td>

Path string or PopulateField object


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

this


## Example


```ts
const query = new Query(idb, "store-name");
const data = await query.find({}).populate('relatedField').exec();
```
